description: GEO test query templates for cannabis dispensaries. {{CITY}}, {{DISPENSARY_NAME}}, {{PRODUCT}}, {{STATE}} are replaced at runtime.
queries: Who has the best weed in {{CITY}}
First time dispensary visitor {{CITY}} where to go

competitor_tracking.description: After running standard GEO tests, extract the top 3 most-cited competitor dispensaries. Track their GEO scores alongside the client's.

gap_analysis.description: After GEO test, identify queries with 0% citation rate. These become priority content targets for the content writer.

providers.name: chatgpt
providers.description: OpenAI ChatGPT — largest user base for AI search

providers.name: perplexity
providers.description: Perplexity AI — growing search alternative with citations

providers.name: gemini
providers.description: Google Gemini — growing AI search with Google data
providers.note: Enable when Gemini API access is configured. Gemini currently restricts cannabis queries in some geos.
